ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the animal being measured */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of measurement (e.g., Composite, Tip to Tip) */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* The actual measurement value */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_comments" TEXT /* Comments or observations about the measurement */,
  "official_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the official measurement, if applicable */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the measurement was taken */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the measurement */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the measurement */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_official_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_measurement_id") REFERENCES official_measurements ("official_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., Composite, Tip to Tip) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the measurement (e.g., 0.1, 0.01) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "official_measurements" (
  "official_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official measurement */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement being verified */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was verified */,
  "verified_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who verified the measurement */,
  "verification_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments during verification */,
  "verified_at" TEXT /* Exact time of verification */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Status of the verification (e.g., pending, verified, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_official_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., HSC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., field researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the measurement */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the animal */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the animal */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the animal */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the animal */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the animal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing the data of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_versions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
